name: CCAvenue
description: One of Indias oldest payment gateways operated by Infibeam Avenues; supports 200+ payment options including cards, UPI, and international currencies.

seo.title: CCAvenue — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: CCAvenue: One of Indias oldest payment gateways operated by Infibeam Avenues; supports 200+ payment options including cards, UPI, and international currencies.

when_to_use: Accepting 200+ Indian payment methods including UPI and international cards
EMI and installment payment processing for high-ticket Indian e-commerce
Multi-currency payment collection for Indian exporters and SaaS
Recurring billing integration for subscription services in India

cons: Integration support slow for small merchants
review.verdict: Broad method coverage and long history in India, but newer competitors offer far better developer experience.
review.best_for: Indian merchants needing widest possible payment method coverage
review.not_for: Dev teams wanting modern SDKs and fast self-serve onboarding
